summary.intent: Run an automated CEO-level review of PR #14 (CHA-17: crm.matters.* RPC filtering) and post the review summary to Linear and GitHub.
summary.outcome: The CEO review was compiled and posted as a PR comment on GitHub (#14). Linear posting was attempted but hit API/auth issues requiring debugging. The review itself was comprehensive, covering scope validation, architecture, security, and open gaps.

repo: crm.matters.list now supports filtering by contactId, status, phase, practiceArea, search (LIKE on title+description), and pagination (offset/limit default 50) — following contacts patterns but more advanced.
list_contacts has zero filtering — an intentional asymmetry vs the newly enhanced list_matters.
Dynamic SQL uses WHERE 1=1 pattern with appended clauses; all filter columns (status, contact_id, updated_at, phase, practice_area) are indexed.
store.rs trait uses default impls so list_matters and list_matters_by_contact delegate to list_matters_filtered — DRY pattern.
Search term is interpolated directly into LIKE format strings without wildcard sanitization (%, _ not escaped) — identified as a gap.
limit param has no max cap — a caller could pass limit=999999 with no server-side guard.
Migrations live in crates/crm/migrations/*.sql; new migration added indexes on phase and practice_area.

code.finding: LIKE search interpolates user input directly into format string without sanitizing SQL wildcard characters (%, _).
Filter param parsing and routing logic lives here; passes parsed filters down to store layer.
Adds indexes on phase and practice_area columns to support efficient filtered queries.

workflow: Headless orchestration sessions use Linear comments as a persistent workpad — title '## Workpad', append on rework rather than overwrite.
CEO review skill (plan-ceo-review) follows a structured flow: system audit → scope challenge → mode selection → security/performance findings → open items.
PR comments via gh CLI work reliably; Linear API posting required separate debugging and may need auth investigation.
mcp__plugin_context-mode batch execute was tried for file reads but failed — fell back to direct Glob/Grep/Read tools.

friction: mcp__plugin_context-mode__ctx_batch_execute failed to locate files, requiring fallback to individual Glob/Read/Grep calls.
Linear API comment posting failed and required multiple debug attempts — auth or API access may not be configured in this environment.
AskUserQuestion was invoked mid-review despite the headless/no-human-in-loop constraint, requiring the agent to self-correct and proceed.
open_items: crm.contacts.list has no filtering — same gap as matters had before this PR; should be addressed in a follow-on issue.
LIKE search does not sanitize SQL wildcard characters (%, _) — user-supplied search terms could produce unexpected matches.
No max cap on limit parameter — a caller could request unbounded results.
No total_count in paginated response — pagination UIs cannot show 'page X of Y' without a separate count query.
Status transition validation (e.g. archived → open) not implemented — deferred by design.
crm.matters.stats aggregate endpoint not implemented — deferred.
crm.matters.get_with_interactions composite query not implemented — deferred.
FTS5 for matter search not implemented — LIKE accepted as sufficient for current volumes.
UUID validation on IDs is a pre-existing gap, not addressed here.
